text:
Best 15+ Candidate Assessment Tools

According to a Career Builder survey, 74% of employers hired the wrong candidate, making thorough evaluation critical.

The 19 Tools Reviewed:
1. WeCP - 200k+ technical questions, AI copilot, real-time code feedback, proctored assessments. $240/month, 7-day free trial.
2. HackerEarth - Customized coding challenges, soft skills assessments, virtual interview tools. $209-$419/month.
3. HackerRank - Pre-made coding problems, AI plagiarism detection. $100-$450/month.
4. Mettl - Psychometric testing, simulation-based assessments, real-time proctoring.
5. Codility - Collaborative pair programming tool (Codelive) and online assessments (Codecheck). $1,200-$5,000/year.
6. HireVue - Behavioral video assessments, conversational AI. $35,000/month.
7. iMocha - Customizable pre-employment tests, AI proctoring. $5,000/year.
8. Xobin - Multi-format assessments, real-time proctoring, AI analytics.
9. TestGorilla - Pre-built tests from different sectors. $75-$115/month.
10. TestDome - 1,300+ premium questions, automated scoring. $100-$24,000.
11. eSkill - Customizable exams, adaptive testing.
12. CoderPad - Live collaborative IDE, take-home assignments. $840-$3,900/year.
13. Glider - AI-based screening tool. $59/month.
14. Harver - Customizable assessments, video interviews. $5,000/year.
15. Vervoe - Task-based assessments with real-world tasks.
16. Toggl Hire - Multi-level assessments, video intro. $20-$469/month.
17. Skillsarena - Customizable assessments, real-time reporting. $43-$324/month.
18. Coderbyte - 1,000+ auto-graded coding challenges. $199/month.
19. Filtered - AI-driven screening, coding assessments. $25-$95/month.

WeCP is positioned as the platform recommendation for streamlining hiring processes through tailored evaluations and comprehensive analytics.
